titleStmt.title: SII 8.692: original edition by K.V. Subrahmanya Aiyer
No. 692. (A.R. No. 378 of 1903). ON THE SAME WALL.

revisionDesc.change: Further conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)
Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti śrī . kopparakecaripaṉmaṟkku
yāṇṭu 4Āvatu mummuṭiccoḻa Iḷaṅko
ve ḷolai . Uṟaiyūrkkūṟṟattu [brahma teya] k kiḻa
varun nāṭṭāruṅ kaṇṭu . taṅkaḷ nāṭṭu Allūr nirni
lattuk kiḻur cantiramaṅkalameṉṟu per kūva
ppaṭun nilattil 1- veli veli nilattil ku
ṭinikkāt tevatāṉam Iṟaiyili Āka Allū
r nakkar koyil parameśva raṟkku tirucceṉṉaṭai
ppuṟamāka 1- velicceyum Ellaivallai te
riccuk kalluṅ kaḷḷiyun nāṭṭi Aṟaiyolai
E ṭuttuk kuṭukka mummuṭicco
ḻa Iḷaṅkoveḷāyiṉa Ātittaṉ muṉaiyarāti
ttariṭainiṉṟu śrīmu kam varat toḻutu talaime
ṟkkoṇṭu vāṅki vācittut tirumukattiṉ
melpaṭṭa paricu Avantiyakovap pallava
raiyaṉāyiṉa mayilai tiṇṭaṉ Āṇattiyā
l Allūrnakkar koyil pa rameśva raṟkku I
ṟaiyili tevatāṉamākak kuṭutta nilattuk ke
llai . kiḻpāṟkkellai Allūrnakarattiṉi
ṉṟu Āṟṟukke poṉa piṇampoku peruvaḻi
kku mekkun teṉpāṟkellai Innakarattār ma
tiḷcuvarukku vaṭakkum melpāṟkellai piṭā
riyār tuṭavaikkum ciṟiyāṉ pullaṉ Allūrt ta
laivāyariṭai vilaikoṇṭa nilam Allūr Ūrāṟ
kkuk kuṭuttu Atiṉ talaimāṟu Ūrāri
ṭaip parivattaṉai ceytukoṇṭu Itdeva
ṟkke tevatāṉamākac ceytukuṭutta nilattukku
m Itde var kuḷattukkum Iccantiramaṅkalattu
nālu māvukkuṅ kiḻakkum vaṭapāṟkkellai kiḻakku no
kki Oṭiya vākkālukku tekkum Āka Ivvicait
ta pannāṉkellaiyuḷ Akappaṭṭa nilattil Allūruṭai
yān Aṟiñcikai pāṇṭan Allūr Ūrāriṭai vilaiko
ṇṭu vayakki Ittevarkkut tiruvārātiṉai ceyyu
m yogi yārkkuk kuṭutta nilam nālumāp puṟa
māka Ivvellaiyuḷ Akappaṭṭa nilam Uṇ
ṇilam Oḻivinṟi Innilam veli 1- veliyu
m kuṭinikkāt tevatāṉa(m)māka Allūr Ū
r Ūre Uḻutukoṇṭu Āṇṭuvarai Aḷappatā
ṉa nellu cūlakkālālp pūriniṟai ḷavu
nellu 100 2 10- ḷa nūṟṟu Irupatin kalamum I
tde var cūlakkā(l)lāle tiruccattimuṟṟattu
Aḷappatākavum Innilattāl ceṉnirve
ṭṭi ceyyātatākavum Annir pāccikoḷvatā
kavum Innilattāl Epper
m Eccoṟum veṭṭiyum vetiṉaiyum maṟṟum
Epperpaṭṭatum Iṟātitākavum Ipparicu Iṟai
yiliyāka mummuṭiccoḻa Iḷaṅkoveḷāyiṉa Ā
tittan muṉaiyarātittar paṇiyāl Ipparicu A
ṟaiyolai ceytukuṭuttom Uṟaiyūrkūṟṟat
tup piramateyak kiḻavarum nāṭṭomum. IvarkA few letters are wanting at the end. Another piece reads thus—1 svasti śrī . ivikṣṇu- 2 kaḷḷai ceyvi[t*]tār 3 ivvūr aṟukaivā- 4 ṇikaṉ nā[ca]karai ku- 5 luṅkar cilai-
Digital edition of SII 8.692 by converted to DHARMA conventions by Dorotea Operato.
